assistant.name: Copilot
assistant.greeting: Hi Jennifer, I can audit your environment and draft your next campaign setup.

groupChat.author: Ava
groupChat.text: hey team — Q3 rewards activation review just wrapped. exec summary: our high-value customer segment is underperforming on rewards redemption. 284K customers with unactivated rewards, 90+ days dormant. that's a real revenue exposure going into summer

groupChat.author: Anna
groupChat.text: hi Ava! 👋 yeah we flagged this in the QBR. the problem is we don't have a clean segment for it yet. data team said 2 weeks minimum to pull the SQL

groupChat.author: Ava
groupChat.text: 2 weeks 😟 by then we're competing with like 3 other banks running summer promos

groupChat.author: Sue
groupChat.text: for context, we ran something similar for our savings customers last month (Summer Savings). Strong engagement. The urgency framing in the subject line was the key I remember…

groupChat.author: Anna
groupChat.text: that's exactly the playbook we need for our high-value segment. personalized, multi-channel, einstein-timed. but we'd need the segment, two emails, and a branching journey. campaign ops said 3 weeks after data delivers

groupChat.author: Ava
groupChat.text: so we're looking at 5 weeks minimum before anything goes out 😬

groupChat.author: Jennifer
groupChat.text: someone mentioned the connected agent can do this stuff directly in here now… Should we test that in a BU?

groupChat.author: Ava
groupChat.text: wait like build the segment AND journey from copilot?

script.text: @Copilot we need to re-engage our high-value customer segment before summer. Can you audit the gap and build the segment + journey for us?

On it. Here's the gap I'm seeing for our **high-value segment**:

---
- **284K** customers with unactivated rewards
- Dormant **90+ days** on redemption
- No clean, reusable segment in place yet
---
This is exactly the **Summer Savings** playbook Sue ran last month — personalized, multi-channel, Einstein-timed. I can build it now without waiting on the data team.

script.title: Segment Built — High-Value Customers
script.text: 284K customers · unactivated rewards · 90+ days dormant. Ready to use across channels.
Segment's live. Now drafting the **branching reactivation journey** — two emails with urgency framing, branching on redemption behavior, Einstein send-time optimization.

script.title: Journey Created — Summer Rewards Reactivation
script.text: 2 emails · Einstein send-time · branch on redeem vs. no-redeem at 72h.
Done — segment **and** journey are ready in the high-value BU. That's ~5 weeks of work compressed into one chat. Want me to schedule the first send for Monday?
